subject: Redis Cluster Sharding and Gossip Protocol

content.principles: 1. Sharding: 16384 hash slots. CRC16(key) % 16384 to determine slot. 2. Gossip Protocol: Decentralized communication. Nodes exchange PING/PONG messages to share cluster state (node status, slot mapping). 3. Failover: Majority of masters vote to promote a slave if a master is down. 4. Client Redirection: MOVED and ASK responses.
pitfalls: Hot keys concentrated on a single shard/node.
Large keys causing slow migration and increased latency.
Network partitions leading to 'split-brain' scenarios (solved by quorum).
follow_up_paths: Codis vs Redis Cluster vs Twemproxy
